scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && npm run bundle && npm run copy-assets
scripts.copy-assets: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/inject', { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync('src/inject/inject.css', 'dist/inject/inject.css'); fs.copyFileSync('src/inject/icon.svg', 'dist/inject/icon.svg');"
